channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Vitamin B6 Deficiency Linked to Worse Liver Disease Outcomes
item.description: Vitamin B6 deficiency is associated with higher risks of liver transplant and hepatic decompensation in various patient groups with primary liver conditions.

item.title: Canada's Approach to Rising Maternal Mortality
item.description: Without a national surveillance system and confidential reporting, Canada cannot accurately assess its maternal mortality rates, according to Medscape.

item.title: Medically Tailored Meals Improve Health and Reduce Costs
item.description: At least a dozen U.S. states are testing medically tailored meals through Medicaid pilot programs, which aim to improve health outcomes and lower expenses.

item.title: Digital Platforms and Policy Changes Reshape GLP-1 Affordability
item.description: A recent report in the Journal of Medical Internet Research examines how new pharmaceutical access models are influencing the cost of GLP-1 drugs in the U.S.
